The '''Velus system''', also known as the '''Velusia system''', was a six-planet [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] which contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Velusia/Legends|Velusia]].<ref name="Core Worlds" />

{{System-stub}}
